/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmy_robot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so -o libmy_robot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so CMakeFiles/my_robot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/my_robot_interfaces/msg/error_status__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_robot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/my_robot_interfaces/msg/object_target__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/student13/debuging/lei_github/nav_test_for_leo/build/my_robot_interfaces:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libmy_robot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
